title: 领完 Claude100 刀，继续申请 GPT 官方福利
excerpt: 程序员 - @pmer - Was very cool to hear about the reasons people love Sol. We're doing the promotion again, except thi
content_html:
Was very cool to hear about the reasons people love Sol. We're doing the promotion again, except this time for ChatGPT Work:

Tweet what you love about ChatGPT Work, claim $100 in free credits, get more work done.

First 10k get the free tokens: https://share-chatgpt-work.openai.chatgpt.site

原文来自：@gdb
